title: ScopeChangeEvent
description: Emitted pre-dispatch when an execute-mode tool_use targets a file absent from the approved PlanDocument.affected_files. Its presence in events.jsonl is the SC-004 test oracle.

attempted_target.description: Repo-relative path the agent attempted to edit.

affected_files_snapshot.description: Frozen copy of PlanDocument.affected_files at halt time, for audit.

tool_name.description: Write-class tool whose invocation triggered the halt.
